title: Cryptool is live on BNB Chain with full fundraising automation
content_html:
Cryptool is now live on BNB Chain.

The launch brings full automation to the BNB Chain fundraising flow:

  • End-to-end automated fundraising
  • Syndicate management without spreadsheets
  • Launchpads spun up in seconds
  • One-click raise pool deployment
  • Native support for BNB, USDT and USDC

OTC market, portfolio and asset management, and co-investing are next on the roadmap.

This is a clear step forward for fundraising on BNB Chain: one platform, fully automated, ready for projects and investors.
author: Cryptool
